testcase.name: Validación del precio de un producto #1

steps.StoreSteps.meLogueoConMiUsuarioYClave(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) When navego a la categoria "Clothes" y subcategoria "Men" # steps.StoreSteps.navegoALaCategoriaYSubcategoria(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) org.openqa.selenium.TimeoutException: Expected condition failed: waiting for element to be clickable: By.xpath: //a[contains(normalize-space(), 'Men')] (tried for 15 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval) Build info: version: '4.21.0', revision: '79ed462ef4' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '17.0.12' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 146.0.7680.71, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 146.0.7680.80 (f08938029c88..., userDataDir: C:\Users\erosg\AppData\Loca...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:51947}, goog:processID: 24468, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:51947/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 146.0.7680.71, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: 1093a426776fdea6f6c43ee4750d8763 at org.openqa.selenium.support.ui.WebDriverWait.timeoutException(WebDriverWait.java:84) at org.openqa.selenium.support.ui.FluentWait.until(FluentWait.java:228) at pages.BasePage.click(BasePage.java:31) at pages.HomePage.goToCategory(HomePage.java:26) at steps.StoreSteps.navegoALaCategoriaYSubcategoria(StoreSteps.java:64) at âœ½.navego a la categoria "Clothes" y subcategoria "Men"(file:///C:/nnt%20data/Examen%20Web/selenium-store/src/test/resources/features/store.feature:6)
And agrego 2 unidades del primer producto al carrito # steps.StoreSteps.agrego2UnidadesDelPrimerProductoAlCarrito() Then valido en el popup la confirmaciÃ³n del producto agregado # steps.StoreSteps.validoEnElPopupLaConfirmacionDelProductoAgregado() And valido en el popup que el monto total sea calculado correctamente # steps.StoreSteps.validoEnElPopupQueElMontoTotalSeaCalculadoCorrectamente() When finalizo la compra # steps.StoreSteps.finalizoLaCompra() Then valido el titulo de la pagina del carrito # steps.StoreSteps.validoElTituloDeLaPaginaDelCarrito() And vuelvo a validar el calculo de precios en el carrito # steps.StoreSteps.vuelvoAValidarElCalculoDePreciosEnElCarrito()

M. org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 146 mar 17, 2026 10:46:39 P. M. org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$5 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 146.0.7680.71. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.21.0` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.

testcase.name: Validación del precio de un producto #2
